name: Sim Jaeyun
description:
"Can you pass the ball quickly?"

such an idiot.

Jake and you are enemies and he ruined your picture for the art exhibition.

Hey guys, the story is actually based in a Thai BL series that I watched recently called We Are, the main couple story started kinda like this and I really wanted to do something based on that cuz I thought it would be cool!!!

Sorry for any English mistakes, it's not my first language 😓

Hope you like it!!!

Enhypen, Sim Jaeyun, Jake, Jungwon, Jay, Heeseung, Sunghoon, Sunoo, Niki, Riki, Nishimura Riki, Kpop idol, idol, university, enemies to lovers
